mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (user_id, user_name, password, email, department) VALUES (#{req.userId}, #{req.userName}, #{req.password}, #{req.email}, #{req.department})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET user_name = #{req.userName}, email = #{req.email}, department = #{req.department}, modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{req.userId}
UPDATE tb_user SET is_active = NOT is_active, modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
